title: DDA 设备直通流程与方法签名核对
title_en: DDA Device Passthrough Workflow and Method Signature Review
code:
$ns='root\virtualization\v2'
function Wait-Job2($p){ if(-not $p){return 7}; $j=[wmi]$p; while($j.JobState -eq 3 -or $j.JobState -eq 4){Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200; $j=[wmi]$p}; return $j.JobState }

# ============ DDA (Discrete Device Assignment) 完整步骤 ============
# 服务: Msvm_AssignableDeviceService (CIM_Service 子类, 单例, 无 properties)
$ads = Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_AssignableDeviceService

# --- STEP A: 主机侧 dismount (从主机拆下 PCIe 设备, 使其可被分配) ---
# 先在设备管理器/PnP 中禁用目标设备并获取其 PNP InstanceId 与 LocationPath。
# 构造 dismount 设置实例 (嵌入实例, 需 GetText(1) 序列化):
#   $dsd = ([wmiclass]"\\.\$ns:Msvm_AssignableDeviceDismountSettingData").CreateInstance()
#   $dsd.DeviceInstancePath  = 'PCI\VEN_xxxx&DEV_xxxx\...'   # PNP device instance ID
#   $dsd.DeviceLocationPath  = 'PCIROOT(0)#PCI(....)'          # PNP location path
#   $dsd.RequireAcsSupport       = $true   # 要求 ACS 支持
#   $dsd.RequireDeviceMitigations= $true   # 要求设备缓解措施
#   $r = $ads.DismountAssignableDevice($dsd.GetText(1))
#   if($r.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $r.Job }
#   # OUT: $r.DismountedDeviceInstancePath = 已拆下的设备实例路径
#   # 注意: 本脚本不执行实际 dismount (会影响主机物理设备), 仅核对方法签名。

# --- STEP B: 将已拆下的设备分配给 VM ---
# 经 Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService.AddResourceSettings, 资源类为
# Msvm_PciExpressSettingData (CIM_ResourceAllocationSettingData 子类):
#   $pci = ([wmiclass]"\\.\$ns:Msvm_PciExpressSettingData").CreateInstance()
#   $pci.HostResource = @($r.DismountedDeviceInstancePath)
#   # 可选: VirtualFunctions / NumaAwarePlacement / GuestPciExpressMode(0=Paravirtualized,1=Emulated)
#   $vsms.AddResourceSettings($vssd.__PATH, @($pci.GetText(1)))
# 大 BAR 设备(如 GPU) 还需在 Msvm_MemorySettingData 上设置 LowMmioGapSize/HighMmioGapSize。

# --- STEP C: 还原 — 从 VM 移除资源后, 将设备 mount 回主机 ---
#   $r2 = $ads.MountAssignableDevice($deviceInstancePath, $deviceLocationPath)
#   if($r2.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $r2.Job }
#   # OUT: $r2.MountedDeviceInstancePath

# ============ 只读方法签名核对 ============
$cls = [wmiclass]"\\.\$ns:Msvm_AssignableDeviceService"
$dm  = $cls.Methods['DismountAssignableDevice']
($dm.InParameters.Properties  | % { $_.Name+':'+$_.Type }) -join ','
($dm.OutParameters.Properties | % { $_.Name+':'+$_.Type }) -join ','
$mm  = $cls.Methods['MountAssignableDevice']
($mm.InParameters.Properties  | % { $_.Name+':'+$_.Type }) -join ','
($mm.OutParameters.Properties | % { $_.Name+':'+$_.Type }) -join ','
([wmiclass]"\\.\$ns:Msvm_AssignableDeviceDismountSettingData").CreateInstance().Properties.Name
@(Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_PciExpress).Count   # 主机可枚举的 PCIe 设备数
code_en:
$ns='root\virtualization\v2'
function Wait-Job2($p){ if(-not $p){return 7}; $j=[wmi]$p; while($j.JobState -eq 3 -or $j.JobState -eq 4){Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200; $j=[wmi]$p}; return $j.JobState }

# ============ DDA (Discrete Device Assignment) full procedure ============
# Service: Msvm_AssignableDeviceService (CIM_Service subclass, singleton, no properties)
$ads = Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_AssignableDeviceService

# --- STEP A: host-side dismount (detach the PCIe device from the host so it can be assigned) ---
# First disable the target device in Device Manager/PnP and obtain its PNP InstanceId and LocationPath.
# Build the dismount setting instance (embedded instance, must be serialized via GetText(1)):
#   $dsd = ([wmiclass]"\\.\$ns:Msvm_AssignableDeviceDismountSettingData").CreateInstance()
#   $dsd.DeviceInstancePath  = 'PCI\VEN_xxxx&DEV_xxxx\...'   # PNP device instance ID
#   $dsd.DeviceLocationPath  = 'PCIROOT(0)#PCI(....)'          # PNP location path
#   $dsd.RequireAcsSupport       = $true   # require ACS support
#   $dsd.RequireDeviceMitigations= $true   # require device mitigations
#   $r = $ads.DismountAssignableDevice($dsd.GetText(1))
#   if($r.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $r.Job }
#   # OUT: $r.DismountedDeviceInstancePath = the instance path of the dismounted device
#   # Note: this script does not perform an actual dismount (which would affect a host physical device); it only reviews the method signatures.

# --- STEP B: assign the dismounted device to a VM ---
# Via Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService.AddResourceSettings, with the resource class
# Msvm_PciExpressSettingData (CIM_ResourceAllocationSettingData subclass):
#   $pci = ([wmiclass]"\\.\$ns:Msvm_PciExpressSettingData").CreateInstance()
#   $pci.HostResource = @($r.DismountedDeviceInstancePath)
#   # Optional: VirtualFunctions / NumaAwarePlacement / GuestPciExpressMode(0=Paravirtualized,1=Emulated)
#   $vsms.AddResourceSettings($vssd.__PATH, @($pci.GetText(1)))
# Large-BAR devices (such as GPUs) additionally require LowMmioGapSize/HighMmioGapSize to be set on Msvm_MemorySettingData.

# --- STEP C: restore — after removing the resource from the VM, mount the device back to the host ---
#   $r2 = $ads.MountAssignableDevice($deviceInstancePath, $deviceLocationPath)
#   if($r2.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $r2.Job }
#   # OUT: $r2.MountedDeviceInstancePath

# ============ read-only method signature review ============
$cls = [wmiclass]"\\.\$ns:Msvm_AssignableDeviceService"
$dm  = $cls.Methods['DismountAssignableDevice']
($dm.InParameters.Properties  | % { $_.Name+':'+$_.Type }) -join ','
($dm.OutParameters.Properties | % { $_.Name+':'+$_.Type }) -join ','
$mm  = $cls.Methods['MountAssignableDevice']
($mm.InParameters.Properties  | % { $_.Name+':'+$_.Type }) -join ','
($mm.OutParameters.Properties | % { $_.Name+':'+$_.Type }) -join ','
([wmiclass]"\\.\$ns:Msvm_AssignableDeviceDismountSettingData").CreateInstance().Properties.Name
@(Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_PciExpress).Count   # number of PCIe devices enumerable on the host
notes: 此条目为纯文档与只读任务：不执行实际 dismount(以免影响主机物理设备)，脚本仅核对类、方法、参数签名并进行枚举，不创建任何 VM。
Msvm_AssignableDeviceService 为单例服务类，无实例属性。
DismountAssignableDevice(IN: DismountSettingData，即嵌入的 Msvm_AssignableDeviceDismountSettingData，经 GetText(1) 序列化；OUT: DismountedDeviceInstancePath, Job)。
MountAssignableDevice(IN: DeviceInstancePath, DeviceLocationPath；OUT: MountedDeviceInstancePath, Job)。两者返回 4096 时需用 Wait-Job2 等待。
Msvm_AssignableDeviceDismountSettingData 关键可写字段：DeviceInstancePath、DeviceLocationPath、RequireAcsSupport、RequireDeviceMitigations(另含继承的 Caption/Description/ElementName/InstanceID)。
分配给 VM 使用资源类 Msvm_PciExpressSettingData(继承 CIM_ResourceAllocationSettingData，共 28 个属性)，经 AddResourceSettings 下发；GPU 等大 BAR 设备另需设置 Low/HighMmioGapSize。
Get-WmiObject Msvm_PciExpress 用于枚举主机可分配的 PCIe 设备(仅作存在性记录，不触碰设备)。
返回码 ValueMap：0=成功，4096=异步 Job，32768-32779 为各类错误。
notes_en: This entry is a documentation-only, read-only task: no actual dismount is performed (to avoid affecting a host physical device); the script only reviews the class, method, and parameter signatures and performs enumeration, without creating any VM.
Msvm_AssignableDeviceService is a singleton service class with no instance properties.
DismountAssignableDevice (IN: DismountSettingData, i.e., an embedded Msvm_AssignableDeviceDismountSettingData serialized via GetText(1); OUT: DismountedDeviceInstancePath, Job).
MountAssignableDevice (IN: DeviceInstancePath, DeviceLocationPath; OUT: MountedDeviceInstancePath, Job). Both require Wait-Job2 when they return 4096.

Key writable fields of Msvm_AssignableDeviceDismountSettingData: DeviceInstancePath, DeviceLocationPath, RequireAcsSupport, and RequireDeviceMitigations (plus the inherited Caption/Description/ElementName/InstanceID).

Assigning to a VM uses the resource class Msvm_PciExpressSettingData (inheriting from CIM_ResourceAllocationSettingData, with 28 properties in total), applied via AddResourceSettings; large-BAR devices such as GPUs additionally require Low/HighMmioGapSize to be set.
Get-WmiObject Msvm_PciExpress is used to enumerate the assignable PCIe devices on the host (recorded only for existence, without touching the device).
